changeSet.author: mercotrace
changeSet.comment: Copy signed preset from linked auction bid where present.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE sales_bill_line_item li SET preset_applied = ae.preset_margin FROM auction_entry ae WHERE li.auction_entry_id = ae.id;

changeSet.author: mercotrace
changeSet.comment: Split legacy merged other_charges (preset + buyer dynamic) when preset was taken from auction.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE sales_bill_line_item li SET other_charges = li.other_charges - li.preset_applied WHERE li.auction_entry_id IS NOT NULL AND li.other_charges >= li.preset_applied;
